name: SubDEndCapStyle
summary: ON_SubDEndCapStyle enumerates the type of end caps functions like ON_SubD::CreateCylinder will create. Use ON_SubDEndCapStyleFromUnsigned(integer value) to convert integer values to an ON_SubDEndCapStyle. Use ON_SubDEndCapStyleToString(end_cap_style) to convert ON_SubDEndCapStyle values to string descriptions.

enum_values.name: Unset
enum_values.summary: Used to indicate the end cap style is not set.

enum_values.name: Quads
enum_values.summary: When the end has an even number of edges, is will be capped with quads. Otherwise it will be capped with triangles.

enum_values.name: Ngon
enum_values.summary: Ends are capped with a n-gon. This is a poor choice when there are a large number of edges in the end boundary.
